description: Style Note The design house of Donna Karan New york never relents when it comes to class. Their fragrances have the same quality. Class and elegance embodied, these perfumes for women are must haves.  Product Details dkny Be Delicious is a spray perfume for women which comes in a circular glass flask with a silver top  Caution Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying in eyesSize100 mlStyle Note  The design house of Donna Karan New York never relents when it comes to class.
